script.title: Ketchup's Dark Secret
script.description: The mysterious origins of ketchup are more complex than you think. Uncovering the truth behind the world's favorite condiment.
script.narration: Ketchup's origins are shrouded in mystery. It didn't start as the sweet and tangy condiment we know today. In fact, it began as a fermented fish sauce from Asia. The British adopted it, and it evolved into a mushroom-based sauce. But here's the part that nobody talks about: ketchup was once a patented medicine. That's right, it was sold as a cure-all for various ailments. The recipe was later bought by Henry J. Heinz, who transformed it into the ketchup we know today. But what's really behind the secrets of ketchup?

scenes.description: Intro to the mysterious origins of ketchup
The transformation of ketchup into a global brand
The secrets behind the world's favorite condiment
